de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class PrettyPrinter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.PrettyPrinter
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    CustomPrettyPrinter, ProgramPrinter

    public class PrettyPrinter
extends Object
    A configurable pretty printer for Java source elements originally from COMPOST.
    Author:
    AL CHANGED FOR KeY. Comments are not printed!

    • Field Summary

      Modifier and Type Field and Description

        public Range getRangeOfFirstExecutableStatement()

      • reset

        public void reset()
        Resets the state of this pretty printer ...

      • setWriter

        public void setWriter(Writer out)
        Set a new stream to write to. Useful to redirect the output while retaining all other settings. Resets the current source positions and comments.

        public int getLine()
        Get current line number.
        Returns:
        the line number, starting with 0.

      • writeToken

        protected void writeToken(int lf,
              int blanks,
              String image,
              NonTerminalProgramElement parent)
                   throws IOException
        Writes an implicit terminal token of a NonTerminal, including its indentation. Sets the indentation if it is necessary or required.
        Throws:
        IOException
        See Also:
        SourceElement.prettyPrint(de.uka.ilkd.key.java.PrettyPrinter)

        the value of the overwriteIndentation property.

      • isOverwritingParsePositions

        protected boolean isOverwritingParsePositions()
        Returns true if the pretty printer should reset the parse positions accordingly.
        Returns:
        the value of the overwriteParsePositions property.

      • printHeader

        protected void printHeader(int lf,
               int blanks,
               ProgramElement elem)
                    throws IOException
        Print program element header.
        Parameters:
        lf - an int value.
        blanks - an int value.
        elem - a program element.
        Throws:
        IOException - occasionally thrown.

      • printHeader

        protected void printHeader(int blanks,
               ProgramElement elem)
                    throws IOException

        blanks - an int value.
        elem - a program element.
        Throws:
        IOException - occasionally thrown.

      • printHeader

        protected void printHeader(ProgramElement elem)
                    throws IOException
        Print program element header.
        Parameters:
        elem - a program element.

      • printHeader

        protected void printHeader(int lf,
               int levelChange,
               int blanks,
               ProgramElement x)
                    throws IOException
        Print program element header.
        Parameters:
        lf - number of line feeds.
        levelChange - the level change.
        blanks - number of white spaces.
        x - the program element.
        Throws:
        IOException - occasionally thrown.

                    throws IOException
